text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I knew it. I've put on a little weight...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to control what I eat while still retaining
as much muscle as possible.)

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well, what do we have here? If it isn't Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
My my! Isn't it a coincidence bumping into each
other here of all places?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You seem to be having some trouble managing
your weight.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Haa ha ha! That reaction tells me I hit the nail on
the head!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Come now... It was a simple inference to make.
One look at your dejected expression after
stepping onto the scale tells it all.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sure... but it's got nothing to do with you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
You are quite right! But you should be grateful to
me all the same, as I came here to bring you some
exceptionally good news!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
You're probably just looking for test subjects for
whatever new concoction you came up with.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ohh, you're not half bad at conjecture yourself.
That's absolutely correct! You see, I've developed
a formula that allows you to freely manipulate
your own weight.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
So, how about it? I get my hands on a little data
for my research, and you get your ideal body
weight! It's a win-win situation!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
That's a shame. But if you change your mind,
don't hesitate to come and see me.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
(I need to sort out my weight myself to avoid
getting tempted into any weird experiments.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to Admire Vega's encounter, she takes her
diet seriously and succeeds in managing her
weight.
